ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "base_effect" TEXT /* Base effect of the skill without any armor modifications */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of what the skill does */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* The time (in seconds) that must pass before the skill can be used again */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* The amount of mana required to use the skill */,
  "skill_type" TEXT /* The type of skill (e.g., offensive, defensive, utility) */,
  "learnable_at_level" INTEGER /* The minimum level a character must be to learn the skill */,
  "required_class" TEXT /* The class type (e.g., Rogue, Fighter) that can learn the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armor_types" (
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each armor type */,
  "armor_name" TEXT /* Name of the armor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the armor type */,
  "defense_value" INTEGER /* The base defense value provided by the armor */,
  "critical_resistance" TEXT /* The percentage reduction in critical hit chance */,
  "stealth_penalty" TEXT /* The penalty to stealth skills when wearing the armor */,
  "movement_speed" TEXT /* The percentage change in movement speed when wearing the armor */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* The rarity of the armor (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills_armor_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the effect entry */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill affected */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the armor type */,
  "effect_modification" TEXT /* Modification to the skill's base effect due to armor */,
  "effect_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the effect modification (if applicable) */,
  "effect_intensity" TEXT /* The intensity of the effect modification (e.g., very strong, moderate) */,
  "conditional_effect" TEXT /* Any conditions under which the effect applies (e.g., only during night) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_armor_effects_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_armor_effects_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armor_types ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Class type of the character (e.g., thief, warrior) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* The current level of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* The current experience points of the character */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* The amount of gold the character has */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* The current mana of the character */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* The current health points of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* The strength attribute of the character */,
  "dexterity" INTEGER /* The dexterity attribute of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* The intelligence attribute of the character */,
  "wisdom" INTEGER /* The wisdom attribute of the character */,
  "charisma" INTEGER /* The charisma attribute of the character */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the character was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skills" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who has the skill */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill the character has */,
  "current_effect" TEXT /* Current effective value of the skill considering armor effects */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* The current level of the skill for the character */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* The date and time when the skill was last used */,
  "next_use_time" TEXT /* The date and time when the skill can be used again (considering cooldown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armor_inventory" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character owning the armor */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the armor piece */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Whether the armor is currently equipped by the character */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the armor was acquired */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* The method by which the armor was acquired (e.g., quest, purchase, trade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "last_session_end" TEXT /* The date and time when the last session ended */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* The total play time of the player */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the player's account (e.g., active, banned, suspended) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* The preferred language of the player */,
  "subscription_tier" TEXT /* The player's subscription tier (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the session in minutes */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* The type of session (e.g., solo, party, event) */,
  "session_level" INTEGER /* The average level of the characters in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player_profiles ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_progressions" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progression entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character developing the skill */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill being developed */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the skill */,
  "experience_needed" INTEGER /* The experience points needed to reach the next level */,
  "last_level_up" TEXT /* The date and time of the last level up */,
  "skill_points_invested" INTEGER /* The number of skill points invested in the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_progressions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_progressions_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character involved in the transaction */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the armor piece in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., equip, unequip, purchase) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "item_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_cost" INTEGER /* The cost of the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "transaction_reason" TEXT /* A brief reason for the transaction (e.g., quest reward, shop purchase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armor_types ("armor_id")
)
